title: Code Challenge by SUMIT 2023
description: AgroHack is a farm assistant that monitors conditions and alerts users to issues. It uses ChatGPT API for decision support and Web3 sensor-sharing between farmers.

title: Code Challenge by SUMIT 2022
description: OpenBook is a digital book platform where books are minted as NFTs, enabling ownership verification and resale.

title: Code Challenge by SUMIT 2021
description: Đumbir is a health-tracking app that uses seven yes-or-no questions to help identify possible conditions.

title: Smart City Split Challenge 2022
description: SmartNest helps egg producers identify laying patterns and improve efficiency through smart farming technology.

title: FMOZ Award
description: Recognized as the best high school student in Bosnia and Herzegovina for the 2021/2022 school year.

title: StUp Competition — SmartNest
description: International student startup competition with SmartNest winning third place.

title: SPI — Best Startup Plan
description: SmartNest awarded for best startup plan at SPI Student Business Incubator in Split.

title: WURI — Djuro (Digital Concierge)
description: The Digital Concierge web application provides fast access to services and information with advanced AI-based interaction.

title: Hack4Split — Dokumeto
description: Dokumeto is a private AI assistant for secure access to internal company data within a local network.

title: Lumen Hackathon 2025 — SkyGuard
description: SkyGuard won third place at Lumen Hackathon 2025.

title: MindTech Hackathon 2025 — CoreMind
description: CoreMind won first place at MindTech Hackathon 2025.

title: Split Web3 Hackathon — BlockByBlock
description: BlockByBlock won first place at the Split Web3 Hackathon.
